claim_text: To test the hypothesis that in-domain DFDs have more utility as a DFD IQ metric than out-of-domain DFDs, we propose a self-supervised feature distance (SSFD47 ) using an encoder 𝜙(l) trained in a self-supervised fashion on the D same MR dataset D used to train the reader study DL reconstruction models (described in Section 2.1).
